hero.subtitle: Experience divine blessings through sacred rituals and spiritual offerings.

bookHavan.heroTitle: Sacred Havan — Your Path to Grace
bookHavan.heroSub: Choose how you wish to receive Maa’s blessings: join from anywhere in the world, or walk into our ancient Siddha Peeth in Nalkheda.
bookHavan.onlineSub: Participate in sacred Vedic rituals from anywhere in the world through live HD video sessions with our experienced pandits.
bookHavan.s1d: Devotees submit their Name, Gotra, Birth Details, WhatsApp Number, and Sankalp for the havan.
bookHavan.s2d: Our temple team schedules the havan on an auspicious muhurat and shares confirmation instantly.
bookHavan.s3d: Join the havan through HD-quality Zoom / Google Meet / WhatsApp video call with live mantra chanting and darshan.
bookHavan.s4d: Pandit ji performs the havan using the devotee’s Name, Gotra, and Sankalp during the sacred rituals.
bookHavan.s5d: Devotees can actively participate from home by following pandit ji’s instructions during the puja.
bookHavan.s6d: After completion, devotees receive recorded video, divine blessings, and prasad dispatch updates.
bookHavan.offSub: Visit our sacred temple and participate physically in divine havan rituals performed by experienced Vedic priests.
bookHavan.o1d: Stand in the living presence of Maa Baglamukhi as havan flames rise in the garbhagriha — every mantra felt in the body and heart.
bookHavan.o2d: Reserved arrangements for families to sit together during the ceremony, guided respectfully by temple staff.
bookHavan.o3d: Your name, gotra, and intention are woven into the ritual with Vedic precision and lineage care.
bookHavan.o4d: Receive blessed prasad from the altar — sanctified offerings to carry Maa’s grace home with you.
bookHavan.o5d: Priority access and quieter moments for deeper darshan when arranged in advance with the office.
bookHavan.o6d: Personal guidance, mantra diksha context, and blessings at the conclusion of your havan.
bookHavan.ctaSub: The Peeth awaits your sankalp — online or in person.

aboutMain.heading: About Maa Baglamukhi Shree Peeth
aboutMain.p1: On the banks of the Lakhundar River in Nalkheda, Madhya Pradesh, Śrī Maa Baglamukhi Siddha Peeth stands as one of India’s deeply honoured centres of Baglamukhi worship — where seekers come for protection, righteous victory, and inner stillness.
aboutMain.p2: Maa Baglamukhi is adored as the lightning power of speech and mind: she quiets harm, confusion, and hostile forces so that dharma and devotion may shine. Here, pujas and havans are offered with Vedic care, sankalp in your name, and the timeless aura of the goddess who grants shelter to every sincere heart.
aboutMain.h1Text: Nalkheda is revered as a Siddha seat where Śakti is invoked with authentic mantra, havan, and disciplined worship passed through lineage.
aboutMain.h2Text: Maa Baglamukhi is worshipped as the force that stills confusion and injustice — victory, protection, and clarity for those who approach with faith.
aboutMain.h3Text: Every visit is meant to feel like darshan in living tradition: lamps, mantra, and the quiet majesty of the Peeth’s sacred atmosphere.

historyLegacy.label: ॥ दिव्य इतिहास ॥
historyLegacy.title: The Sacred Legacy of Maa Baglamukhi
historyLegacy.subtitle: Discover the ancient spiritual history, Mahabharata connection, and divine Trishakti form of Maa Baglamukhi worshipped at Nalkheda Siddha Peeth.
historyLegacy.s1p1: The sacred idol of Maa Baglamukhi at Nalkheda is worshipped in a rare three-faced divine form known as Trishakti Swaroop. Maa Baglamukhi appears at the centre, symbolising Stambhan Shakti and divine protection, while Maa Lakshmi and Maa Saraswati are honoured as aspects of the same divine presence — grace, learning, and auspiciousness flowing from one sacred energy.
historyLegacy.s1p3: The self-manifested (Swayambhu) murti is regarded as one of the rarest spiritual manifestations among Baglamukhi Siddha Peeths in India, drawing seekers who long for authentic darshan and lineage-rooted worship.
historyLegacy.s2p1: Oral and devotional traditions associate Nalkheda with the age of the Mahabharata. It is believed that Lord Krishna counselled Yudhishthira and the Pandavas to turn to Maa Baglamukhi for righteous strength, protection, and the removal of hostile forces before great trials.
historyLegacy.s2p2: Yudhishthira is traditionally said to have established worship at this Siddha Peeth to seek divine blessings — not as literal proof for historians, but as living memory held in the hearts of generations of devotees.
historyLegacy.s2p3: In that spirit, Maa Baglamukhi was invoked for:
historyLegacy.s2w4: Divine guidance on the path of dharma
historyLegacy.tl1d: Sacred memory links this land with ancient dharma and prayer before decisive moments.
historyLegacy.tl2d: The tradition of seeking Śakti’s shelter through mantra, faith, and right conduct.
historyLegacy.tl3d: Yudhishthira’s sankalp and the Pandavas’ reverence remembered in devotional accounts.
historyLegacy.tl4d: Nalkheda honoured as a seat where Baglamukhi worship deepened into a living pilgrimage centre.
historyLegacy.tl5d: Lineage worship, mantra, and havan continued under respected tantra–Vedic norms.
historyLegacy.s3p1: For centuries, sages, tantric practitioners, and sincere seekers have performed deep sadhana in the spiritual atmosphere of Nalkheda Siddha Peeth. The sanctity of the region near the Lakhundar River supported mantra siddhi, disciplined practice, and awakening of inner clarity.
historyLegacy.s3p2: The temple became widely known for:
historyLegacy.quote: Maa Baglamukhi represents the divine force that stills negativity, protects truth, and grants spiritual strength to her devotees.

aboutHero.body: Shree Maa Baglamukhi Siddha Peeth Nalkheda is one of the most sacred centers of Shakti worship in India, where devotees seek protection, victory, and inner transformation — in continuity with ages of reverence and sadhana.

aboutEnergy.label: ✦ DIVINE ENERGY ✦
aboutEnergy.intro: The Peeth is not spectacle — it is continuity. What devotees describe as “power” is often clarity after long prayer, the warmth of aarti, and the courage that rises in sacred space.
aboutEnergy.c0x: The tradition of stilling negativity and hostile forces through disciplined mantra and sincere offering — approached with respect and proper guidance.
aboutEnergy.c1x: Many devotees pray for clarity, dignity, and right outcome in legal matters, seeking Maa’s grace to steady the mind and remove obstacles.
aboutEnergy.c2x: A sanctuary for those burdened by fear, envy, or harmful influences — inviting prayer, ethical conduct, and inner calm.
aboutEnergy.c3x: The Peeth is associated with authentic tantric worship within lineage norms — always best undertaken with qualified guidance.
aboutEnergy.c4x: Beyond outer victory, the path here strengthens courage, patience, and devotion in daily life.
aboutEnergy.c5x: Pilgrimage, seva, and regular worship help devotees turn struggle into surrender and effort into grace.

aboutVideo.label: ✦ TEMPLE EXPERIENCE ✦
aboutVideo.subtitle: Every frame carries the energy of prayer, fire rituals, sacred chants, and the divine aura of Maa Baglamukhi Siddha Peeth.
aboutVideo.modalHint: Unmute and use controls in the player
aboutVideo.havanDesc: Witness the sacred fire ritual performed for victory, protection, removal of obstacles, and divine blessings of Maa Baglamukhi.
aboutVideo.darshanDesc: Experience the powerful and peaceful divine darshan of Maa Baglamukhi adorned in golden shringar and sacred flowers.
aboutVideo.ritualsDesc: Immerse yourself in the spiritual vibrations, temple chants, diyas, and devotional rituals performed daily at the Siddha Peeth.
aboutVideo.journeyDesc: Explore the divine spiritual environment of Maa Baglamukhi Siddha Peeth, where devotees arrive seeking faith, strength, and transformation.

aboutRituals.label: ✦ SACRED RITUALS ✦
aboutRituals.sub: Each ritual is conducted with dignity and scriptural care. Details may vary by season and priest availability — the temple office will guide you kindly.
aboutRituals.r0m: Sacred fire offering invoking Maa’s grace for protection and clarity.
aboutRituals.r0d: Half day to full day (as arranged)
aboutRituals.r0b: Collective sankalp, powerful mantra recitation, and traditional offerings.
aboutRituals.r1m: Prayers for steadiness, truth, and dignified resolution in legal matters.
aboutRituals.r1b: Calm mind, ethical strength, and supportive spiritual environment.
aboutRituals.r2m: Traditional worship seeking removal of hostile forces and obstacles.
aboutRituals.r2b: Guided by temple priests; performed with scriptural discipline.
aboutRituals.r3m: Focused mantra practice for success in righteous endeavours.
aboutRituals.r3b: Structured recitation with sankalp and periodic reporting to priests.
aboutRituals.r4m: Household and personal prayers for safety and peace.
aboutRituals.r4b: Ideal for families seeking ongoing divine shelter.
aboutRituals.r5m: Personal guidance for sincere practitioners under proper supervision.
aboutRituals.r5b: Tailored to capacity; always respectful of tradition and safety.

aboutQuote.label: ✦ SHAKTI ✦
aboutQuote.translation: “The Divine Mother resides within all energies of existence.”
aboutQuote.note: — Reflective English line; not a word-for-word scriptural translation.

aboutFinal.body: Every prayer offered at Maa Baglamukhi Siddha Peeth joins a river of devotion older than any single lifetime — carrying hope, surrender, and the quiet courage to begin again.

mantra.label: ✦ DAILY MANTRA ✦
mantra.sanskrit: ॐ ह्लीं बगलामुखी सर्वदुष्टानां वाचं मुखं स्तम्भय ह्लीं ॐ नमः
mantra.meaning: O Maa Baglamukhi, paralyze the speech and mind of all malevolent forces. Salutations to you.

aboutTemple.label: ✦ THE SACRED LEGEND ✦
aboutTemple.p1: Nestled in the heart of Malwa, Shree Maa Baglamukhi Siddha Peeth is one of only three ancient temples in India dedicated to the eighth Mahavidya. The swayambhu (self-manifested) idol radiates a frequency that pilgrims describe as "the silence that ends all chaos."
aboutTemple.p2: For over a millennium, sages, kings and warriors have come here to seek protection, dissolve enemies and reclaim their voice. Today, the temple remains a living, breathing monument to the unbroken tantric tradition of Sanatana Dharma.
aboutTemple.t0x: The swayambhu Baglamukhi idol is unearthed by a saint in dense forests of Nalkheda.
aboutTemple.t1x: Maharaja Naidev establishes daily worship & grand annual festivals.
aboutTemple.t2x: Nalkheda becomes the central peeth for Mahavidya tantric practices in central India.
aboutTemple.t3x: Over 1.2 million devotees from 28 countries seek darshan every year.

liveDarshan.subtitle: Connect with the divine in real-time. Join thousands of devotees in worship from anywhere in the world.
liveDarshan.toastOk: 🪔 Your diya glows at Maa's feet.
liveDarshan.toastErr: Could not light diya. Try again.

festivals.label: ✦ FESTIVAL CALENDAR ✦
festivals.subtitle: Be present for the most powerful nights at the temple — each festival is a cosmic gateway.

miracles.label: ✦ DEVOTEE STORIES ✦
miracles.blurb: From courtrooms in Mumbai to homes in California, devotees share how Maa Baglamukhi turned despair into divine victory.
miracles.m0: After 8 years of legal struggle, I performed Baglamukhi Havan at Nalkheda. Within 41 days, the verdict turned in my favor. Maa truly answers.
miracles.m1: My business was on the verge of collapse. The Pandit ji performed Shatru Nashak Puja remotely. Today, we are debt-free and thriving.
miracles.m2: I traveled 1600 km with a heavy heart. I came back lighter than a feather. The energy of this Siddha Peeth is beyond words.
miracles.m3: Maa Baglamukhi removed obstacles I thought were permanent. The cosmic intelligence here is real, ancient, and alive.

donate.label: ✦ DAAN ✦
donate.sub: Every rupee is used transparently for seva, daily prasad, gau seva and temple restoration.
donate.causeAnnaDesc: Feed 1,000 pilgrims daily at the temple kitchen.
donate.causeGauDesc: Care for 80+ rescued cows in our goshala.
donate.successLine: Your daan has reached Maa's feet
donate.name: Name
donate.toastOk: 🙏 Maa accepts your offering with grace.

reach.label: ✦ PILGRIMAGE GUIDE ✦
reach.r0d: Daily flights from Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru. Taxi to temple ~3.5 hours.
reach.r1d: Express trains stop at Shujalpur. Local taxi/auto to Nalkheda in 50 min.
reach.r2d: Excellent NH bus connectivity from Indore, Ujjain, Bhopal & Kota.
reach.r3d: AB Road via Dewas-Maksi. Smooth 3-hour drive. Free temple parking available.

faq.label: ✦ QUESTIONS ✦
faq.q0: Where is Shree Maa Baglamukhi Siddha Peeth located?
faq.a0: The temple is located in Nalkheda, Agar Malwa district, Madhya Pradesh, India — one of only three ancient Baglamukhi shrines in the country.
faq.q1: Can puja be performed on my behalf if I cannot visit?
faq.a1: Yes. Online puja with sankalp in your name and gotra is performed by our priests. You receive a video recording and prasad by courier.
faq.q2: What are the temple darshan timings?
faq.a2: Morning: 5:00 AM – 12:30 PM. Evening: 4:00 PM – 10:00 PM. Mangala Aarti at 5:30 AM and Shayan Aarti at 9:30 PM.
faq.q3: Is there accommodation near the temple?
faq.a3: Yes, the temple trust dharamshala, premium hotels and homestays are available within 2 km. We assist with booking on request.
faq.q4: How is Maa Baglamukhi different from other Devis?
faq.a4: Maa Baglamukhi is the 8th Mahavidya. She represents the power to stop, paralyse and silence enemies — granting victory in court, debate, conflict, and inner battles.

gallery.label: ✦ DIVINE GALLERY ✦
gallery.subtitle: Captured during morning aartis, mahotsavs and silent midnights — moments where the divine becomes visible.

askPandit.welcome: 🙏 Pranam, devotee. I am Pandit ji at Maa Baglamukhi Peeth. How may I guide you on your spiritual path today?
askPandit.errorFallback: 🙏 Pandit ji is in dhyana. Please try again in a moment.
